name: Dean Wall Sconce - Room Essentials™
description:
Create a warm and inviting ambiance with this Dean Wall Sconce from Room Essentials™. Made of metal, this cylindrical wall sconce features a brass finish that adds modern charm to your space. It comes with a non-removable integrated bulb with a 1-way setting that can be turned on and off by a remote control for ease of use. Install it on any wall in your living room or bedroom for a soft, warm glow.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
